title: Loopcraft — Live Loop Mixer
description: A 4-track synthesized loop station — sequence beats, mix them live, and render your groove to a real WAV file.
concept: Loopcraft is a tiny live-looping mixer built entirely on the Web Audio API. Four synthesized instruments (kick, snare, hat, pluck-bass) each get their own 16-step pattern, a mixer strip (volume, pan, mute, solo, tone knob), and sit on a shared master bus with filter, delay, and reverb sends. Four pattern slots can be chained into a song, saved automatically, shared via a URL, or bounced to a downloadable WAV.
features: 4-track 16-step sequencer across 4 pattern slots (A–D) with song-chain mode
Per-track mixer strip: volume, pan, mute, solo, and a tone-shaping knob per instrument
Master bus with live filter, delay, and reverb sends
Real WAV export via OfflineAudioContext + hand-rolled PCM encoding
localStorage autosave and shareable btoa/atob URL links

interaction.mouse: Click steps to toggle beats, drag sliders to mix
interaction.click: Play/stop, mute/solo, slot switching, export, share
interaction.touch: Full touch support for step grid and all controls
